recommendations.title: The Furies
recommendations.overview: A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game — a game that can only have one winner.

recommendations.title: Red White & Blue
recommendations.overview: A woman attracts the attention of a psychotic former Army interrogator and an emotionally fragile young man caring for his ailing mother.

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer
recommendations.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.

recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Hypnotic
recommendations.overview: A young woman seeking self-improvement enlists the help of a renowned hypnotist but, after a handful of intense sessions, discovers unexpected and deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: The Savages
recommendations.overview: A sister and brother face the realities of familial responsibility as they begin to care for their ailing father.

recommendations.title: The Last Matinee
recommendations.overview: In 1993, spectators at the last screening of a horror film at a downtown cinema fall one by one into the hands of a sadistic and ruthless killer.

recommendations.title: The OctoGames
recommendations.overview: Eight contestants compete in eight deadly, classic children's games. They seek fame beyond their wildest dreams, competing for the chance to take over the YouTube channel of the famous yet elusive masked content creator known only as "JaxPro".
